result.stdout:
Usage: Introspector.CLI <directory> [options]

Options:
  --path-starts-with <value>      Only process files with paths starting with the specified value.
  --path-ends-with <value>        Only process files with paths ending with the specified value.
  --path-include-pattern <regex>  Only process files with paths matching the specified regular expression.
  --path-exclude-pattern <regex>  Exclude files with paths matching the specified regular expression.
  --help, -h                      Show this help message.

Examples:
  Introspector.CLI /path/to/directory --path-starts-with /path/to --path-ends-with .dll
  Introspector.CLI /path/to/directory --path-include-pattern ".*Test.*" --path-exclude-pattern ".*Ignore.*"
